estimate.narrative_context: Annual federal+GA tax savings on $75K appreciated-stock DAF contribution at 37% federal + 5.19% GA marginal rate; pre-transaction year baseline.

computation_inputs.note: Baseline annual figure; transaction-year bunch contribution modeled separately in REC-CHR-002

scenario_range.computation_method: Range based on $50K-$100K/year contribution band cited in rec template at combined 42.19% marginal rate

action_items.description: Select DAF sponsor (Fidelity Charitable, Schwab Charitable, or community foundation) and document rationale.
sub_steps: Compare commercial vs. community foundation sponsors
Confirm acceptance of business interests for future REC-CHR-002 funding

action_items.description: Open DAF account; appoint Marcus and Catherine as primary advisors and children as successors.
Fund DAF in current tax year with appreciated brokerage securities ($50K-$100K target).
sub_steps: Identify highest-gain lots from Schwab taxable brokerage

action_items.description: Coordinate with CPA on Form 8283 filing and AGI-limit/carryforward tracking.
sub_steps: Document carryforward schedule if AGI limit hit

action_items.description: Establish ongoing DAF granting cadence and annual review of giving plan.

recommendations._audit_notes: Annual baseline modeled at $75K midpoint of $50K-$100K rec-file band; transaction-year bunched gift modeled in REC-CHR-002 to avoid double-counting.

estimate.narrative_context: Combined federal income tax + capital gains avoided on pre-LOI gift of 5% non-voting Holdco units; range driven by $32M-$48M HIS valuation. Excludes Georgia 5.19% deduction benefit for simplicity.

computation_inputs.high_calc_usd: 5%×88%×$48M×0.70 = $1.478M gifted FMV → ~$899K savings; with full 5% pre-discount aggregating multiple-year contributions could reach $2.4M

scenario_range.computation_method: Brief rationale band; matches rec-file worked example range

action_items.description: Confirm transaction not past binding LOI; re-confirm before any gift transfer.
sub_steps: Document LOI status as of gift date

action_items.description: Engage qualified appraiser for FMV of non-voting Holdco units with discount support.
Prepare formal gift documentation and Form 8283 with appraiser's report attached.
Transfer non-voting Holdco units to DAF (or CRT/foundation per chosen variant).
Coordinate with banker/M&A counsel that DAF/charity now appears as shareholder of record.
File Form 8283 with personal return for gift year; track 30% AGI limit and 5-year carryforward.

recommendations._audit_notes: Critical pre-LOI timing constraint. Range expressed as tuple in estimate to capture valuation-band uncertainty; both bookends within scenario_range.

estimate.narrative_context: Approximate federal charitable deduction at funding for $5M FLIP CRUT, 5% unitrust, 20-year+ horizon; PV of remainder at current §7520 rate of 5.00% (May 2026).

computation_inputs.note: PV of remainder ~22% on lifetime CRUT for age 52 at 5% §7520; deduction = funding × ~22%

scenario_range.computation_method: Rec-file worked example range $1.0M-$1.5M for $5M funding; midpoint scaled to age 52

estimate.narrative_context: Family remainder gift-tax-free at end of 20-year zeroed-out grantor CLAT. Range: $0 if asset matches §7520 hurdle (5.00% May 2026); ~$5M+ if asset earns 8%. Highly sensitive to §7520 environment and asset performance.

computation_inputs.note: Borderline match; current §7520 of 5.00% is moderate. Lower §7520 favors CLAT; current rate yields modest favorability.

scenario_range.computation_method: $5M funded; remainder = funding × (1+r)^20 - $400K annuity stream FV; r=5% (zero), r=8% (~$5M), r=10% (~$10M)
